metadata.description: Internal Claude Code plugins for the astrojones org.

plugins.name: astrojones-dev

plugins.name: repo-agent-harness
plugins.description: Repo-aware coding-agent harness, one MCP server for everything: deterministic repo tools, built-in Serena semantic navigation (proxied serena_* tools), configurable repo health, safe-shell policies, coding-workflow skills, and verification hooks.
